data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for deterministic read model rebuild/replay support, but the evidence provided does not confirm this capability. While the linked use case describes a plugin that can replay from a checkpoint, it lacks concrete API reads or persisted state checks to demonstrate that the requirement is fully satisfied. The absence of specific evidence related to the deterministic nature of the read model rebuild indicates a gap in coverage.
gaps: No concrete evidence of deterministic read model rebuild/replay support.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the deterministic read model rebuild/replay support.
